provider: CUHK Department of Sports Science and Physical Education ESHEN Programme A Study Scheme
note: Only the Programme A requirement pool for students admitted in 2025-26 and thereafter is included. SPED2050, SPED2122 and PHPC2009 appear in the wider Course List but not in the Programme A Study Scheme and are therefore excluded. No Year or Semester is inferred.
